ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pharmacies" (
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmacy */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider (e.g., CVS, Walgreens) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the pharmacy is located */,
  "geocoded_address" TEXT /* Geocoded address of the pharmacy in POINT format */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the pharmacy */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the pharmacy */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* JSON object containing the opening hours of the pharmacy */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number issued by health authorities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "order_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the medication (e.g., Paxlovid, Lagevrio) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the medication */,
  "drug_class" TEXT /* Classification of the medication (e.g., antiviral, antibiotic) */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Form of the medication (e.g., tablet, liquid) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medication (e.g., 400mg) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was approved by regulatory bodies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy where the medication is stocked */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication in stock */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the medication */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock level was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "minimum_stock" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level required to avoid shortages */,
  "maximum_stock" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to prevent overstocking */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the last reorder was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy placing the order */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication being ordered */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the medication ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pharmacist, inventory manager) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., pharmacist, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report details */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., inventory, orders, alerts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy for which the location is recorded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the pharmacy's geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the pharmacy's geolocation */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the pharmacy */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the pharmacy is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the pharmacy is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the pharmacy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy receiving the alert */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication related to the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., low stock, out of stock) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES pharmacies ("pharmacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory record being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, subtraction) */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., restock, sale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
